description_long: This object consists of three metal open-ended wrenches, each of varying size, arranged upright and leaning against each other in a tripod-like formation. The wrenches display visible signs of use, with some areas showing rust and discoloration, particularly on the darker wrench. The metal surfaces are mostly matte, with some areas appearing slightly smoother and more reflective due to wear. The wrenches have fixed, U-shaped jaws at both ends, suitable for gripping nuts and bolts of different sizes. Faint manufacturer markings and size indicators are visible on the handles, though some are partially obscured by rust or wear. The overall appearance suggests these tools have been used in practical, possibly outdoor or garage settings.
description: A group of three well-used metal open-ended wrenches, showing signs of rust and wear, arranged upright and leaning together. The wrenches vary in size and have fixed, U-shaped jaws at both ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wrenches leaning together, with the central wrench's side profile and the left and right wrenches' faces visible; rust and wear are prominent on the left wrench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wrenches and the open jaws of the two outer wrenches; the central wrench appears the thickest and most upright.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the wrenches, with the right wrench's face and the left wrench's edge visible; rust is most evident on the left wrench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open jaws of the two outer wrenches and the central wrench's edge; manufacturer markings are more visible on the right wrench.
attribute_brand_logo: Some faint manufacturer markings are visible on the handles, but no distinct brand logo is clearly identifiable.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Visible rust and wear marks are present, especially on the leftmost wrench, with brown discoloration and surface corrosion on the jaws and handle.
